response.justification: Bogdan is a strong, versatile senior engineer with ~15 years of production software experience, deep TypeScript/Node.js skills, and current hands-on work with MCP servers and agentic-workflow tooling at re:cinq. However, his AI-specific experience spans roughly a year, far short of the required 8+ years building production AI solutions, and the resume shows no Python, no vector database or RAG work, no evaluation/observability pipelines for AI systems, and only light cloud-platform exposure (AWS CDK in one role). He could grow into the role, but he does not meet the staff-level GenAI bar as specified.
strengths: Current hands-on experience with MCP code generators and AI-agent infrastructure
15+ years of production engineering across web, backend, embedded, and high-throughput systems
Strong TypeScript/Node.js depth plus mentoring, workshops, and open-source leadership
concerns: Falls well short of 8+ years building AI-driven solutions; GenAI work only since 2025
No demonstrated RAG, vector database, multi-agent framework, or LLM evaluation experience
No Python on the resume and limited evidence of designing systems on major cloud platforms

key_factors.factor: Missing RAG/vector DB and Python skills
MCP/agentic tooling and strong engineering fundamentals
